'''Stieg''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. It was populated by the [[Stieg-Fan]], who ran a peaceful government. During the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kegan/Legends|Kegan's]] isolationist period, [[The Learning]] taught that Stieg was a dangerous place to visit, surrounded in war and without any governing body.<ref name="EAOC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Fight for Truth]]'' {{1stm}}
